name: Rachel Dempsey
text: Working with Eric on our bathroom remodel was seamless. He is an excellent communicator, provides clear estimates, and his attention to detail is unmatched. I appreciated his thoughtful recommendations throughout the process to ensure the space was functional and beautiful at the end. We would absolutely work with Heartwood Craft again.

name: Ashley Phillips
text: Working with Heartwood Craft was a pleasure. Eric was easy to work with and very thorough. He provided clear mock-ups and estimates. I also learned a lot in the process. I would not hesitate to reach out to him for any future project we have.

name: Susan McCauley
text: Eric did a great job on my deck replacement. He has great skills and experience. He was really good at communicating, totally responsible and I would certainly use him again. Thanks Eric.

name: Cheryl Margulies
text: The work done by Eric O’Keefe was fantastic. His designs and attention to detail was beyond anything we could have imagined. He has a great eye for color and unique designs. He listened to what we liked and disliked and improved upon our ideas with his creativity.

name: Dave Richardson
text:
Enthusiastically recommended. Great work, responsive owner and good price.

Eric installed a huge new window in our master bedroom and rebuilt an upstairs deck/balcony, and both came out perfectly.  The window had to special ordered, which took a few weeks, but Eric handled everything and got it in, delivered and he installed it perfectly. Really good workmanship and quick, at a price way better than the “big name” renewal company.

The deck was originally slated for just a new floor, but as we got into it there was obvious water-intrusion damage to the sheathing under the siding.  Eric switched gears seamlessly and did all the remedial work, and rebuilt the deck with smart and attractive design choices. Really solid work!

I highly recommend Heartwood Craft. Eric is also a very chill guy, organized, conscientious and super easy to work with. These are rare qualities around here these days, and Eric is a gem!
